testcase.name: test_nyaa_last_uploads

failure.message: aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host nyaa.si:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1006)')]

testcase.failure:
self = <aiohttp.connector.TCPConnector object at 0x104ec2bd0>, addr_infos = [] req = <aiohttp.client_reqrep.ClientRequest object at 0x104f46790> timeout = ClientTimeout(total=300, connect=None, sock_read=None, sock_connect=30, ceil_threshold=5) client_error = <class 'aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorError'> args = (functools.partial(<class 'aiohttp.client_proto.ResponseHandler'>, loop=<_UnixSelectorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False>),) kwargs = {'server_hostname': 'nyaa.si', 'ssl': <ssl.SSLContext object at 0x104d6df40>} sock = <socket.socket [closed] fd=-1, family=2, type=1, proto=6>
async def _wrap_create_connection( self, *args: Any, addr_infos: List[AddrInfoType], req: ClientRequest, timeout: "ClientTimeout", client_error: Type[Exception] = ClientConnectorError, **kwargs: Any, ) -> Tuple[asyncio.Transport, ResponseHandler]: try: async with ceil_timeout( timeout.sock_connect, ceil_threshold=timeout.ceil_threshold ): sock = await aiohappyeyeballs.start_connection( addr_infos=addr_infos, local_addr_infos=self._local_addr_infos, happy_eyeballs_delay=self._happy_eyeballs_delay, interleave=self._interleave, loop=self._loop, socket_factory=self._socket_factory, ) # Add ssl_shutdown_timeout for Python 3.11+ when SSL is used if ( kwargs.get("ssl") and self._ssl_shutdown_timeout and sys.version_info >= (3, 11) ): kwargs["ssl_shutdown_timeout"] = self._ssl_shutdown_timeout > return await self._loop.create_connection(*args, **kwargs, sock=sock) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1313: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:1112: in create_connection transport, protocol = await self._create_connection_transport( /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/base_events.py:1145: in _create_connection_transport await waiter /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/sslproto.py:575: in _on_handshake_complete raise handshake_exc /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/asyncio/sslproto.py:557: in _do_handshake self._sslobj.do_handshake() _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ssl.SSLObject object at 0x1048fbd10>
def do_handshake(self): """Start the SSL/TLS handshake.""" > self._sslobj.do_handshake() E ssl.SSLCertVerificationError: [SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1006)
/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.11/lib/python3.11/ssl.py:979: SSLCertVerificationError
The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_nyaa_last_uploads(): > request = await Nyaa.last_uploads(number_of_results=10) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:8: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nyaapy/anime_site.py:13: in last_uploads async with session.get(self.URL) as r: .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:1510: in __aenter__ self._resp: _RetType = await self._coro ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:779: in _request resp = await handler(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:734: in _connect_and_send_request conn = await self._connector.connect( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:672: in connect proto = await self._create_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1239: in _create_connection _, proto = await self._create_direct_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1611: in _create_direct_connection raise last_exc .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1580: in _create_direct_connection transp, proto = await self._wrap_create_connection( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <aiohttp.connector.TCPConnector object at 0x104ec2bd0>, addr_infos = [] req = <aiohttp.client_reqrep.ClientRequest object at 0x104f46790> timeout = ClientTimeout(total=300, connect=None, sock_read=None, sock_connect=30, ceil_threshold=5) client_error = <class 'aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorError'> args = (functools.partial(<class 'aiohttp.client_proto.ResponseHandler'>, loop=<_UnixSelectorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False>),) kwargs = {'server_hostname': 'nyaa.si', 'ssl': <ssl.SSLContext object at 0x104d6df40>} sock = <socket.socket [closed] fd=-1, family=2, type=1, proto=6>
async def _wrap_create_connection( self, *args: Any, addr_infos: List[AddrInfoType], req: ClientRequest, timeout: "ClientTimeout", client_error: Type[Exception] = ClientConnectorError, **kwargs: Any, ) -> Tuple[asyncio.Transport, ResponseHandler]: try: async with ceil_timeout( timeout.sock_connect, ceil_threshold=timeout.ceil_threshold ): sock = await aiohappyeyeballs.start_connection( addr_infos=addr_infos, local_addr_infos=self._local_addr_infos, happy_eyeballs_delay=self._happy_eyeballs_delay, interleave=self._interleave, loop=self._loop, socket_factory=self._socket_factory, ) # Add ssl_shutdown_timeout for Python 3.11+ when SSL is used if ( kwargs.get("ssl") and self._ssl_shutdown_timeout and sys.version_info >= (3, 11) ): kwargs["ssl_shutdown_timeout"] = self._ssl_shutdown_timeout return await self._loop.create_connection(*args, **kwargs, sock=sock) except cert_errors as exc: > raise ClientConnectorCertificateError(req.connection_key, exc) from exc E aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host nyaa.si:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1006)')]
.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1315: ClientConnectorCertificateError

The above exception was the direct cause of the following exception:
@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_nyaa_search(): > request = await Nyaa.search(keyword="koe no katachi") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:17: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nyaapy/anime_site.py:65: in search async with session.get(search_uri) as http_response: .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:1510: in __aenter__ self._resp: _RetType = await self._coro ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:779: in _request resp = await handler(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:734: in _connect_and_send_request conn = await self._connector.connect( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:672: in connect proto = await self._create_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1239: in _create_connection _, proto = await self._create_direct_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1611: in _create_direct_connection raise last_exc .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1580: in _create_direct_connection transp, proto = await self._wrap_create_connection( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

@pytest.mark.asyncio async def test_nyaa_get_from_user(): > request = await Nyaa.get_from_user(username="Erai-raws") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/integration/test_nyaasi.py:32: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ nyaapy/anime_site.py:92: in get_from_user async with session.get(f"{self.URL}/user/{username}") as r: .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:1510: in __aenter__ self._resp: _RetType = await self._coro ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:779: in _request resp = await handler(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/client.py:734: in _connect_and_send_request conn = await self._connector.connect( .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:672: in connect proto = await self._create_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1239: in _create_connection _, proto = await self._create_direct_connection(req, traces, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1611: in _create_direct_connection raise last_exc .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/aiohttp/connector.py:1580: in _create_direct_connection transp, proto = await self._wrap_create_connection( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <aiohttp.connector.TCPConnector object at 0x104fe9290>, addr_infos = [] req = <aiohttp.client_reqrep.ClientRequest object at 0x104feb7d0> timeout = ClientTimeout(total=300, connect=None, sock_read=None, sock_connect=30, ceil_threshold=5) client_error = <class 'aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorError'> args = (functools.partial(<class 'aiohttp.client_proto.ResponseHandler'>, loop=<_UnixSelectorEventLoop running=False closed=False debug=False>),) kwargs = {'server_hostname': 'nyaa.si', 'ssl': <ssl.SSLContext object at 0x104d6df40>} sock = <socket.socket [closed] fd=-1, family=2, type=1, proto=6>
async def _wrap_create_connection( self, *args: Any, addr_infos: List[AddrInfoType], req: ClientRequest, timeout: "ClientTimeout", client_error: Type[Exception] = ClientConnectorError, **kwargs: Any, ) -> Tuple[asyncio.Transport, ResponseHandler]: try: async with ceil_timeout( timeout.sock_connect, ceil_threshold=timeout.ceil_threshold ): sock = await aiohappyeyeballs.start_connection( addr_infos=addr_infos, local_addr_infos=self._local_addr_infos, happy_eyeballs_delay=self._happy_eyeballs_delay, interleave=self._interleave, loop=self._loop, socket_factory=self._socket_factory, ) # Add ssl_shutdown_timeout for Python 3.11+ when SSL is used if ( kwargs.get("ssl") and self._ssl_shutdown_timeout and sys.version_info >= (3, 11) ): kwargs["ssl_shutdown_timeout"] = self._ssl_shutdown_timeout return await self._loop.create_connection(*args, **kwargs, sock=sock) except cert_errors as exc: > raise ClientConnectorCertificateError(req.connection_key, exc) from exc E aiohttp.client_exceptions.ClientConnectorCertificateError: Cannot connect to host nyaa.si:443 ssl:True [SSLCertVerificationError: (1, '[SSL: CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED] certificate verify failed: unable to get local issuer certificate (_ssl.c:1006)')]
